welcome.title: Wellbeing Survey
welcome.intro: We kindly ask you to fill out this period's wellbeing survey on behalf of {{company_name}}.
welcome.continue_draft: You have a partially completed survey

question.rank_hint: Rank by priority (most important on top)

confirmation.title: You are about to submit the survey

success.title: Thanks {{name}}! 🎉
success.message: You have successfully completed the wellbeing survey.
success.impact: Your contribution will add value to your company's wellbeing journey. 🌱
success.anonymous_note: Your answers will be processed anonymously.

errors.token_invalid: Invalid survey link. Please check your email.
errors.token_used: You have already filled out this survey. Thank you for your participation! ✅
errors.token_expired: This survey link has expired. Please contact your HR department. ⏰
errors.submit_failed: Survey could not be submitted. Please try again.
errors.contact_hr: You can contact your HR department for any questions.

physical.title: Physical Wellbeing
physical.description: This section has questions about your energy, sleep, and general health status.

mental.title: Mental & Emotional Wellbeing
mental.description: Questions about stress, focus, and emotional balance.

social.title: Social & Relational Wellbeing
social.description: Questions about team harmony, belonging, and support.

financial.title: Financial Wellbeing
financial.description: Questions about financial security and satisfaction.

work.title: Work & Meaning
work.description: Questions about work meaning, career growth, and balance.
